task: Add ProcessSpawner port trait and TokioProcessSpawner adapter to PlayCua core/native crate

notes: 27 unit tests passed in the library/bin targets.
New TokioProcessSpawner tests covered piped stdio and kill() behavior.
The requested crates/playcua-core path does not exist in this workspace; the equivalent implementation was added to the native crate used by this repo.
Workspace dependencies already included tokio and async-trait, so no Cargo dependency changes were required.
